tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-014: Enforce multi-tenant security and Row-Level Security for data access.
tasks.description: Implement Row-Level Security policies and tenant boundary enforcement logic within the Bun API middleware layer.
completion_criteria: Row-Level Security policies are successfully applied to all database access queries.
Unauthorized tenant access attempts return 403 Forbidden status.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-015: Return unauthorized access responses within 50ms for restricted tenant data.
tasks.description: Optimize authentication response pathways to ensure sub-50ms latency for rejection payloads.
tasks.backing_tool: Bun HTTP Server / Async Auth Layer
completion_criteria: Latency metrics confirm unauthorized access responses are delivered under 50ms.
Auth service health checks validate low-latency constraints.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-001: Accept and validate property image and 3D asset data uploads including format rejection logic.
tasks.description: Implement the POST /assets/upload endpoint handler with MIME type validation and file integrity checks.
tasks.backing_tool: Bun File System / Bun Stream Validator
completion_criteria: Invalid file formats are rejected with appropriate HTTP error codes.
Valid assets are acknowledged upon receipt before processing begins.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-002: Index valid assets within 10 seconds post-upload for search systems.
tasks.description: Configure background indexing job to ingest and vectorize assets against the 10-second SLA.
completion_criteria: Indexer job logs confirm all assets are indexed within 10 seconds of upload completion.
Search queries return results for newly uploaded assets.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-003: Manage offline data capture and synchronization buffers for mobile capture contexts.
tasks.description: Develop offline queue persistence logic and retry mechanism for disconnected mobile clients.
completion_criteria: Offline buffer entries are successfully synced upon network restoration.
Sync queue status reflects accurate retry counts and TTL status.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-004: Return service provider search results with relevance scores using AI Agent processing.
tasks.description: Integrate AI Agent API to compute match scores and retrieve provider profiles for search endpoints.
completion_criteria: Search results include valid relevance scores from the AI Agent.
API response adheres to the specified schema for ProviderProfile data model.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-005: Render bid estimate comparison tables ensuring minimum bid entry thresholds.
tasks.description: Implement frontend and backend logic to display Good-Better-Best estimates and validate bid amounts.
completion_criteria: UI renders bid estimates with correct 'Good', 'Better', 'Best' classifications.
Bids below minimum threshold are filtered or flagged correctly.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-006: Extract and validate CC&R and Bylaws clauses using AI confidence scoring.
tasks.description: Build NLP pipeline to extract clauses from uploaded documents and assign confidence scores.
completion_criteria: Extraction endpoint returns BylawsClause entities with confidence scores.
Low confidence extractions are flagged for manual review.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-007: Monitor statutory deadlines for regulatory obligations.
tasks.description: Implement background scheduler to check and persist StatutoryDeadline events based on jurisdiction.
completion_criteria: StatutoryDeadline records are accurately maintained and flagged for approach.
Alerts are triggered appropriately for upcoming obligations.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-008: Generate compliance notification payloads for regulatory alerts.
tasks.description: Construct standardized payload objects for regulatory alerts to be dispatched via Notification Dispatcher.
completion_criteria: Notification payloads are generated successfully for all triggered deadlines.
Alert payloads conform to the required schema and jurisdiction templates.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-009: Manage service action item workflow states and record audit log transitions.
tasks.description: Implement state machine logic to transition ActionItem statuses and write TransitionLog entries.
completion_criteria: Workflow state transitions are logged accurately in TransitionLog.
Audit logs are immutable and retrievable for all state changes.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-010: Reflect status updates immediately in the UI for workflow progress.
tasks.description: Implement optimistic UI updates and WebSocket/REST polling hooks to show real-time workflow states.
completion_criteria: UI reflects workflow status updates immediately after backend events.
Data consistency is maintained between client and server state.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-011: Process mass email/SMS batches for recipient lists and track delivery status.
tasks.description: Develop batch processing queue to handle mass communications and track per-recipient delivery.
completion_criteria: Mass email/SMS batches are processed without data loss.
Delivery status is updated for each attempt in DeliveryAttempt records.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-012: Resume delivery attempts within 2 hours upon network reconnection.
tasks.description: Implement retry logic for failed notifications to resume sending within the 2-hour window.
completion_criteria: Failed attempts are successfully resumed within 2 hours of network availability.
Retry counts in DeliveryAttempt reflect all resubmission attempts.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-013: Confirm receipt of messages for bounce rate tracking.
tasks.description: Capture bounce receipts and update delivery status to finalize bounce rate metrics.
tasks.backing_tool: Email Provider Webhooks / SMS API Webhooks
completion_criteria: Bounce rates are accurately calculated based on receipt confirmations.
MessageBatch status reflects final completion state.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-016: Process payment requests for deposits and service fees via integrated payment gateway.
tasks.description: Integrate Stripe/Square gateway to process deposit and service fee transactions securely.
tasks.backing_tool: Stripe SDK / Square SDK / Bun Crypto
completion_criteria: Payment intents are successfully created and confirmed in the gateway.
Transaction records are persisted in PaymentIntent data model.

tasks.component_responsibility: RSP-017: Generate electronic proof of payment and receipt documents.
tasks.description: Create and store PDF receipt documents after successful payment processing via gateway.
completion_criteria: ReceiptDocument is generated and accessible via the provided document_url.
Receipts are linked correctly to the corresponding PaymentIntent.
